🌷
4th Anniversary · 25 June
4 of 4 petals written
✅
26 June
Where the marriage all began. In the Scottish highlands in the most amazing area of TONGUE on top of a rickety old castle but with a cosy night stay. A few tears and a glass of wine later we were engaged! Little did we know how much our lives would change in just a 4+ more years!
✅
27 June
Always there supporting my efforts to be a mediocre surfer, travelling and even moving to Sydney despite being a victim to one of my boards. I appreciate you and love you for all of that and the life style we’ve built.
✅
28 June
Between Sydney and London we had such a great honey moon and it was your first time to ‘Asia’. Despite getting spitty butt (2/2 on first time excursion spitties *cough* morroco *cough*). Little did I know then you were going to be a stinker and it ran in the family but as much as it smells I still love you. Little did we know what life would be like when we got to Australia. Certainly not sipping pina coladas and getting daily massages but still pretty good!
✅
29 June
Then first new member of our family. Little did we know what we were signing up for. The first few days in the crate beside were bed, squeezing each others hand hoping he sleeps. It is actually eerie close to how it is with a baby and in hindsight he was helping us prepare for the next chapter. I love how you always want to include him on walks and embrace the chaos it just speaks to your inclusive personality and makes me want to be better with him with that.
✅
30 June
Then came our first and you got into your mommy rhythm. You’ve been such a great mom and you clearly love being one. You bring the whole family up and we are all so lucky to have you!
✅
1 July
Port Douglas and baby moon with little ossie on the way. We didn’t know his name then but we knew he’d be special. To be a stay at home mom while preggy and with a toddler is no small feat and admire your commitment and dedication to the family through all of it.
✅
2 July
Then there was 5! Little ossie came into the world with super mom abilities he came out in just 1, 2 and 3 pushes! We’ve had to divide and conquer and you really have conquered being a mom of 2. Always making time for Chloe even though you’re running on fumes. I appreciate all the hard work you do and think you’r amazing. You make being a mom look so easy!
✅
🎂
36th Birthday · 3 July
3 of 3 candles written
✅
